description: I was rear-ended on the 405 freeway in Los Angeles last Tuesday. The other driver admitted fault at the scene. I have neck and back pain and my car needs $8,000 in repairs. The other driver's insurance is offering me $2,000 to settle.
My husband hit me last night and I need a restraining order immediately. We have two children and I'm afraid for our safety. We are in San Diego.
I was fired from my job at a tech company in San Francisco after I reported harassment to HR. I believe it was retaliation. I have emails that prove the timeline.
I want to update my will and set up a trust for my grandchildren. I own property in California and Arizona.
I received a DUI last weekend in Sacramento. My court date is in three weeks. This is my first offense.
